tools.name: qto_walls
tools.description: Returns wall quantities from the active Revit model grouped by type, level, or phase, including length, area, and volume metrics.

tools.name: qto_floors
tools.description: Returns floor quantities grouped by type or level, including area and volume.

tools.name: qto_ceilings
tools.description: Returns ceiling quantities grouped by type or level, including area.

tools.name: qto_railings
tools.description: Returns railing quantities in linear meters grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_families_count
tools.description: Returns counts of family instances in the model grouped by category, family, type, or level.

tools.name: qto_struct_beams
tools.description: Returns structural beam quantities grouped by type or level, including linear meters and optional volume.

tools.name: qto_struct_columns
tools.description: Returns structural column quantities grouped by type or level, including linear meters and optional volume.

tools.name: qto_struct_foundations
tools.description: Returns structural foundation counts and volumes grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_struct_concrete
tools.description: Returns combined concrete volumes and linear meters for all structural concrete elements.

tools.name: qto_mep_pipes
tools.description: Returns pipe quantities in linear meters grouped by system, type, or level, with optional diameter bucket breakdown.

tools.name: qto_mep_ducts
tools.description: Returns duct quantities in linear meters grouped by system, type, or level, including surface area estimates.

tools.name: qto_mep_cabletrays
tools.description: Returns cable tray quantities in linear meters grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_mep_conduits
tools.description: Returns conduit quantities in linear meters grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_mep_duct_fittings_count
tools.description: Returns counts of duct fittings grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_mep_air_terminals_count
tools.description: Returns counts of air terminals grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_mep_mechanical_equip_count
tools.description: Returns counts of mechanical equipment grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_mep_pipe_fittings_count
tools.description: Returns counts of pipe fittings grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_mep_pipe_accessories_count
tools.description: Returns counts of pipe accessories grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_mep_plumbing_equipment_count
tools.description: Returns counts of plumbing equipment grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_mep_plumbing_fixtures_count
tools.description: Returns counts of plumbing fixtures grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_electrical_equipment_count
tools.description: Returns counts of electrical equipment grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_electrical_lighting_count
tools.description: Returns counts of lighting fixtures grouped by type or level.

tools.name: qto_electrical_devices_count
tools.description: Returns counts of electrical devices grouped by type or level.

autodesk_apis_used: Revit API - Element quantities and geometry
